weapon bonus = { 
    0
    4

}


//----- Green flag events ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

WhenGreenFlagClicked()
{
    Music = 23;
    List.DeleteAll(Key Items);
    Forever
    {
        Sound.PlayUntilDone(Music);
    }
}

WhenGreenFlagClicked()
{
    List.DeleteAll(Pending Text);
    Looks.SetEffectTo(COLOR, 0);
    money = 0;
    level = 1;
    Sound.SetVolumeTo(50);
    max hp = 25;
    to gain exp = 0;
    hp = 25;
    exp = 0;
    Forever
    {
        Repeat ((666 / max hp))
        {
            If ((exp > (total exp[(level + 1)] - 1)) And (level < 60))
            {
                Sound.Play(Level Up);
                Call Speed Level;
                List.Add(Pending Text, 100);
                List.Add(Pending Text, "L");
            }
            If (hp > max hp)
            {
                hp = max hp;
            }
            If List.ContainsItem(Key Items, 39)
            {
                shield = 2;
            }
            If List.ContainsItem(Key Items, 40)
            {
                shield = 3;
            }
            If List.ContainsItem(Key Items, 41)
            {
                shield = 4;
            }
            weapon = 1;
            If List.ContainsItem(Key Items, 52)
            {
                weapon = 2;
            }
            If List.ContainsItem(Key Items, 53)
            {
                weapon = 3;
            }
            If List.ContainsItem(Key Items, 54)
            {
                weapon = 4;
            }
        }
    }
}

WhenGreenFlagClicked()
{
    var a = 0;
    to gain exp = 0;
    var d = 0;
    Forever
    {
        If (Sensing.KeyPressed(1) And (potions[1] > 0))
        {
            Sound.Play(Glug);
            hp += 50;
            List.ReplaceItem(potions, 1, (potions[1] - 1));
            List.Add(Pending Text, 55);
            If (hp > max hp)
            {
                List.Add(Pending Text, (50 - (hp - max hp)));
            }
            Else
            {
                List.Add(Pending Text, 50);
            }
            If (hp > max hp)
            {
                hp = max hp;
            }
            Wait Until (Not (Sensing.KeyPressed(1)));
        }
        If (Sensing.KeyPressed(2) And (potions[2] > 0))
        {
            Sound.Play(Glug);
            hp += 100;
            List.ReplaceItem(potions, 2, (potions[2] - 1));
            List.Add(Pending Text, 55);
            If (hp > max hp)
            {
                List.Add(Pending Text, (100 - (hp - max hp)));
            }
            Else
            {
                List.Add(Pending Text, 100);
            }
            If (hp > max hp)
            {
                hp = max hp;
            }
            Wait Until (Not (Sensing.KeyPressed(2)));
        }
        If (Sensing.KeyPressed(3) And (potions[3] > 0))
        {
            Sound.Play(Glug);
            hp += 300;
            List.ReplaceItem(potions, 3, (potions[3] - 1));
            List.Add(Pending Text, 55);
            If (hp > max hp)
            {
                List.Add(Pending Text, (300 - (hp - max hp)));
            }
            Else
            {
                List.Add(Pending Text, 300);
            }
            If (hp > max hp)
            {
                hp = max hp;
            }
            Wait Until (Not (Sensing.KeyPressed(3)));
        }
        If (max hp > 300)
        {
            max hp = 300;
        }
    }
}

WhenGreenFlagClicked()
{
    Forever
    {
        If (to gain exp > 0)
        {
            togain = to gain exp;
            Repeat (8)
            {
                exp += (togain / 8);
            }
            to gain exp += (-1 * togain);
        }
    }
}

WhenGreenFlagClicked()
{
    Interactable character = 0;
}

WhenGreenFlagClicked()
{
    enemies defeated on 16 = 0;
    Event.Broadcast("Lcoation Change");
    text = 35;
    text cooldown = 50;
    Wait Until (Sensing.Of(y position, Player) > -69);
    text = 36;
    text cooldown = 45;
    Wait Until (Sensing.Of(y position, Player) > 150);
    text = 37;
    text cooldown = 44;
    Wait Until (Sensing.Of(x position, Player) > -200);
    text = 38;
    text cooldown = 43;
    Wait Until (Sensing.Of(x position, Player) > -110);
    text = 39;
    text cooldown = 42;
    Wait Until (Sensing.Of(x position, Player) > 200);
    text = 40;
    text cooldown = 41;
}


//----- Broadcast received events -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

WhenBroadcastReceived(Bungee Jumping)
{
    Interactable character = 1;
    hover = 1;
    Repeat Until Sensing.KeyPressed(space)
    {
        text = (hover + 23);
        text cooldown = 60;
        If (Sensing.KeyPressed(down arrow) And (hover < 4))
        {
            hover = 2;
            text = (hover + 23);
            Control.Wait(0.5);
        }
        If (Sensing.KeyPressed(up arrow) And (hover > 1))
        {
            hover = 1;
            text = (hover + 23);
            Control.Wait(0.5);
        }
    }
    text = 26;
    text cooldown = 60;
    If (hover == 1)
    {
        If (money > 34)
        {
            money += -35;
            Control.Wait(1);
            text = 27;
            text cooldown = 90;
            Control.Wait(1);
            Sound.Play(Jump);
            Control.Wait(2);
            Sound.Play(mixkit-cartoon-falling-whistle-395);
            text = 28;
            text cooldown = 90;
            Control.Wait(1);
            Call Location xy(0)(-35) location(1) music(1);
            If (Operator.Random(1 , 8) == 1)
            {
                text = 30;
                text cooldown = 90;
                Control.Wait(2);
                Sound.Play(1_);
                text = 31;
                text cooldown = 33;
                hp += -150;
            }
            Else
            {
                text = 29;
                text cooldown = 90;
                Control.Wait(2);
                If List.ContainsItem(Key Items, 57)
                {
                    text = 33;
                    text cooldown = 33;
                    Control.Wait(1);
                    to gain exp += 3000;
                }
                Else
                {
                    text = 32;
                    text cooldown = 32;
                    Control.Wait(1);
                    to gain exp += 1500;
                }
            }
        }
        Else
        {
            text = 34;
            text cooldown = 35;
        }
    }
    Interactable character = 0;
}

WhenBroadcastReceived(Game Over)
{
    If (Location < 17)
    {
        Stop(other scripts in sprite);
    }
}

WhenBroadcastReceived(Resturant: Order)
{
    Interactable character = 1;
    hover = 1;
    Repeat Until Sensing.KeyPressed(space)
    {
        text = (hover + 10);
        text cooldown = 60;
        If (Sensing.KeyPressed(down arrow) And (hover < 4))
        {
            hover += 1;
            text = (hover + 10);
            Control.Wait(0.5);
        }
        If (Sensing.KeyPressed(up arrow) And (hover > 1))
        {
            hover += -1;
            text = (hover + 10);
            Control.Wait(0.5);
        }
    }
    If (money < cost food[hover])
    {
        text = 19;
        Stop(this script);
    }
    If (hover < 4)
    {
        money += (-1 * cost food[hover]);
        text = 20;
        text cooldown = 600;
        Control.Wait(2);
        If ((hover == 2) And (var a < 25))
        {
            var a += 1;
            If (var a > 25)
            {
                text = 43;
            }
        }
        If ((hover == 1) And (var d < 25))
        {
            var d += 1;
            If (var d > 25)
            {
                text = 44;
            }
        }
        If (hover == 3)
        {
            max hp += 2;
            hp += 2;
            If (max hp > 301)
            {
                text = 45;
            }
        }
        Sound.Play((hover + 16));
        If (text < 43)
        {
            text = (hover + 14);
        }
        text cooldown = 100;
        Control.Wait(2);
    }
    text = 18;
    text cooldown = 35;
    Interactable character = 0;
}


//----- Custom blocks -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Define Location xy(string x)(string y) location(string l) music(string m) (warp=false)
{
    Location = l;
    Music = m;
    Sound.StopAllSounds();
    Motion.GoToXY(x, y);
    Event.Broadcast("Lcoation Change");
    Event.Broadcast("xx");
}

Define Speed Level (warp=true)
{
    Repeat Until (Not (((exp > (total exp[(level + 1)] - 1)) And (level < 60))))
    {
        level += 1;
        max hp += (Operator.Round((106 / (level + 10.2))) + 1);
        hp += (Operator.Round((106 / (level + 10.2))) + 1);
    }
}
